trend.aria: Score trend over the last 30 days

overview.note: Relative trends · last 30 days — each line on its own scale (0–100). A visual link is not causation.

corr.moveTogether: <0>{{driver}}</0> and <1>{{outcome}}</1> tend to move together (when one is high, so is the other).
corr.moveOpposite: <0>{{driver}}</0> and <1>{{outcome}}</1> tend to move inversely (when one is high, the other is low).
corr.empty: There's no significant link in the data right now — and usually there simply isn't, which is fine. If a stable, significant-enough pattern appears, we'll surface it here to explore.
corr.note: Early observations only — correlation is not causation. The data is aggregated and statistically filtered for reliability.

scatter.aria: Point scatter: horizontal axis {{driver}}, vertical axis {{outcome}}
scatter.title: Horizontal axis: {{driver}} · vertical axis: {{outcome}}

empty.noGoals: No goals yet. {{action}} a goal to see the score.
